seoTitle: Hastings vs Hatter Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hastings and Hatter Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hastings vs Hatter Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hastings and Hatter Hill.
heading: Hastings vs Hatter Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hastings, Western Australia and Hatter Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hatter Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Hastings (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hastings or Hatter Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hastings has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Hatter Hill scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hastings scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Hatter Hill scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hastings or Hatter Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hatter Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
